cards.flavor_text: [i]If you see that green mask you better take care of them quick, or else you'll be swimming in eyeballs.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Haste, prowess, stylish [i](Your rank starts at D. it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.)[/i]
[i]Get Ready, Sugar! —[/i] Whenever Nevan attacks, scry 1. If your rank is A or higher, scry 3 instead. Then reveal the top card of your library. If it's a noncreature, nonland card with mana value equal to or less than her power, you may freecast it. [i](Cast it without paying its mana cost.)[/i]
[i]Devil Arm[/i] — When Nevan dies, exile her. While she's exiled, you may cast her other face.

Menace, stylish [i](Your rank starts at D.)[/i]
“[i]Let's get violent!” — [/i]Whenever one or more creatures are dealt noncombat damage by a source you control, if at least one of those creatures doesn't have lethal damage on it, you may exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card. 
[i]Kablooey — [/i]Whenever Dante attacks, if your rank is A or higher, he deals 2 damage to any target.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“Mankind? What makes you think I give a shit?”[/i]
